query: DELETE FROM establishments WHERE address REGEXP '\\([0-9]{2}\\)[0-9]' OR address LIKE '%whatsapp%' OR address LIKE '%Whatsapp%' OR address LIKE '%WhatsApp%' OR address LIKE '%watssap%' OR address LIKE '%Zap%' OR address LIKE '%zap%' OR address LIKE '%Atendimento%' OR address LIKE '%atendimento%';
